remainingBlockers: Production Google Workspace SSO requires Bryan to choose tenant domain(s), auto-provisioning policy, break-glass local-login policy, and Google Cloud OAuth client owner

Cloudflare Pages must be configured with GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET, GOOGLE_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI, AUTH_GOOGLE_SSO_ENABLED, and GOOGLE_OAUTH_ALLOWED_HOSTED_DOMAINS before live SSO can be enabled

Tenant-owned Drive storage switching and tenant offboarding/export implementation remain future work
